text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I won! I finished first!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: And the whole crowd was watching—watching me run, not just stand there looking pretty.
choice_data_list: You showed them your true skill!
You showed them your true skill!
You have what it takes to go for more!
You have what it takes to go for more!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: And the whole crowd was watching—watching me run, not just stand there looking pretty.
choice_data_list: You showed them your true skill!
You showed them your true skill!
You have what it takes to go for more!
You have what it takes to go for more!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
My true skill! Damn, okay, I like the sound of
that. Like I have all this hidden potential or
something.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I'm so confused. Somehow I'm, like, more
excited than I was before the race.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer, when's the next one? I wanna run
more and more.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I want to run and win, and let everyone know that
I'm not just some pretty doll!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What? You're not going to compliment me first?
Would it hurt to let me enjoy this victory?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ah... But I'm still smiling. I can do even better,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It actually makes me really happy to hear you say that. I mean, my manager tells me the same thing, but you believe in my strength.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well, I can't let you down now, can I? All right,
starting tomorrow, no more going easy on me!
